name: io.github.InstaCode/icloud-calendar-mcp-server
description: MCP server for iCloud Calendar via CalDAV. List calendars, read and write events, with Apple ID + app-specific-password auth.

environment_variables.name: ICLOUD_USERNAME
environment_variables.description: Apple ID email address used for CalDAV authentication.

environment_variables.name: ICLOUD_APP_PASSWORD
environment_variables.description: App-specific password generated at appleid.apple.com. The regular Apple ID password will not work because of 2FA.
